subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was received, and from its contents it became evident that thou dost cherish the utmost desire for me to hasten to those regions. I, too, have the most intense [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامهٴ تو رسید و از مضمون معلوم گردید که نهایت آرزو داری که من بآنصفحات شتابم من را نیز نهایت اشتیاق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consultation
